title.en: He left directly from the Six-Winged Family.

content.en:
After the rewards were given, the other extradimensional realms stayed to comprehend the mysterious fragments, where they could comprehend the three extradimensional epoch time.

And since Ye Tian directly obtained a mysterious fragment, he didn't need to stay here.

He left directly from the Six-Winged Family.

However, Ye Tian was very vigilant, and after leaving the Six-Winged Family, he had been using his copy body to sense the surroundings.

This time, he obtained six extra-dimensional Chiyuan Pills and a mysterious fragment, not to mention its value, the key is that these things are hard to find!

There will definitely be forces that will attack him, and it will not be possible to dispatch the second realm.

After all, these things can't arouse the greed of the second realm, but it is still possible to dispatch multiple transcendent realms at the peak of the first realm.

Death Void.

Ye Tian is shuttling.

Suddenly, his face was solemn.

He sensed the aura of an extradimensional realm, and the void around him was frozen and sealed.

"Ten extradimensional realms, six first realm peaks, four first realm late stage, what a big arm!"

Judging from the situation of copying talent snooping and their name information, these ten extradimensional realms should be from the Sky Voyeur Pavilion.

I have to say that the intelligence work of Peep Heaven Pavilion was very unlucky, and the action was really fast, and his location was locked as soon as possible. 830

With his strength, there was no problem in killing these ten extradimensional realms.

However, once he killed them and angered the Sky See, he would be unable to stop the second realm's extradimensional realm.

"I can only drive them away!"

Ye Tian was also very helpless, after all, his strength was too weak, if he had the cultivation of the second realm, where did he need to be afraid of Peeping Heaven Pavilion!

"Get out!"

Ye Tian showed a trace of extradimensional rules.

And it was this trace of extra-dimensional rules that directly scared away the super-dimensional realm of the scholars of the Peep Heaven Pavilion.

"Extradimensional rules, go!"

The ten extradimensional realms of the Heavenly Pavilion quickly fled away.

......

The territory of the 6,000th is the headquarters of the Heavenly Pavilion.

These ten extra-dimensional realms came back, and they immediately told Ye Tian about his comprehension of super-dimensional rules.

"What, that Ye Tian Realm Lord actually comprehended a trace of extradimensional rules!"

The peak powerhouse of the first realm of the Heavenly Pavilion, the True Lin Realm Lord, frowned.

He never expected that a superdimensional realm who had cultivated in the early stage of the first realm would actually comprehend the rules of superdimensionality, this talent is demonic!

He also comprehended the rules of the super dimension, and comprehended the six wires of the super dimensional rule (AEEE), if he made a move, he would have the hope of killing the other party, but if he let the other party escape, it would be a big enemy for the Sky Pavilion!

As for the strong people who invite the second realm, this little thing needs to be moved to the second realm, and the second realm will be annoyed to death.

"Forget it, you didn't reveal your identities either, forget it this time!"

The Lord of the True Lin Realm waved his hand.

However, he didn't know that Ye Tian already knew their identities.

Ye Tian left the Six Thousand Territory and returned to the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory not long after, bringing back the six Extradimensional Chiyuan Pills and the mysterious fragments.

As soon as he could, he began to comprehend this mysterious fragment and devour the Extra-Dimensional Chiyuan Pill to improve his cultivation.

"This fragment is somewhat similar to the mysterious fragment that appeared in the auction of the Extreme Yang Realm at the beginning, but the fragment at the auction is too ordinary, and the power contained in it is not enough for one-tenth or even one-tenth of this piece. "

With such a mysterious fragment, Ye Tian felt that he could definitely comprehend a few more extradimensional rules.

"Strange blood pupils, urging !!!"

Ye Tian overloaded and urged the strange blood pupil to analyze this mysterious fragment and comprehend the extradimensional rules contained in the mysterious fragment.

Rumble!!!

The energy contained in the Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill was too majestic, and it quickly improved Ye Tian's cultivation.

The speed of this ascension far exceeded that of ordinary cultivation, and at this speed, it would not be long before he could raise his cultivation to the middle stage of the first realm.

Gradually, an extradimensional era passed.

this day. []

Rumble!

Ye Tian's cultivation has broken through, from the early stage of the first realm to the middle stage of the first realm, and his strength has increased by a cut.

And his progress in extradimensional rules is also very remarkable, and he has already comprehended fifteen extradimensional rules, and this speed of progress is second only to the great opportunity conceived by the original comprehension of the 7001 realm.

The point is, this mysterious fragment can allow Ye Tian to comprehend for a long time!

Time has passed since one extradimensional epoch after another.

The six super-dimensional Chiyuan Pills were gradually refined by Ye Tian, and they were all extremely close to the late stage of the first realm, and it was estimated that after cultivating for a while, they would be able to break through to the late realm of the first realm.

If it is refined for other extra-dimensional realms, six super-dimensional Chiyuan Pills are enough to make a super-dimensional realm in the early stage of the first realm to cultivate to the peak realm of the first realm.

"It's worthy of the Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill, if there are a large number of Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pills, I can easily break through to the peak realm of the first realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Moreover, his realm of extradimensional rules has skyrocketed, and now he has comprehended thirty extradimensional rules.

Such a speed of progress has also skyrocketed his strength.

......

Six thousand territory, six-winged family.

At this time.

The Six-Winged Family's second realm peak powerhouse, the Purple Winged Realm Lord, was extremely excited inside.

"Soon, with the help of this treasure, at most a thousand extra-dimensional eras, I am expected to open up the extra-dimensional realm in my body and advance to the third realm!"

He stared at a black bottle in his hand, revealing a look of hope.

This black bottle is a mysterious thing, known as the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, but this is only one of the multi-dimensional treasure bottles, it is rumored that all the multi-dimensional treasure bottles are fused together, and it is a super dimensional treasure that is enough to go crazy in the fifth realm of the extradimensional realm.

The Duowei vase is scattered in many territories, and it is impossible to collect them all.

But even if it is a single bottle, its value is higher than that of high-level extradimensional soldiers.

In order to obtain this multi-dimensional treasure bottle, he paid a great price, and even invited the forces such as the Jialan Chamber of Commerce and the Treasure Refining Building, which also knew about the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, but he told it, provided that he first used the multi-dimensional treasure bottle of one trillion extradimensional epochs, and after that, it was used by other forces, and everyone took turns to use it.

In this way, after a long time, these forces all have the hope of giving birth to the third realm of the extradimensional realm.

Wow!

A drop of black liquid flew out from the inside of the multidimensional treasure bottle, this is the multidimensional essence of the multidimensional treasure bottle, just a drop of multidimensional essence can make a second realm transcendent realm cultivation soar, but the most important thing is that it can assist the second realm multidimensional realm to comprehend the transcendent rules.

The biggest restriction of the second realm impacting the third realm is the extradimensional rules, if the extradimensional rules are not up to standard, and daring to impact the third realm, it is looking for death.

And with the multi-dimensional essence, he has the hope of comprehending the extradimensional rules to the target level.

He had already refined the first drop of extradimensional essence, and this was the second drop.
